payload.tactic: have key : BRA.big (fun (n0 : nonce) => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \in SplitC2.I2.RO.m{hr}) (fun (n0 : nonce) => (size (filter (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`1 = n0) Mem.lc{hr}))%r) (undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})) + BRA.big (fun (n0 : nonce) => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \notin SplitC2.I2.RO.m{hr}) (fun (n0 : nonce) => (size (filter (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`1 = n0) Mem.lc{hr}))%r) (undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})) = (size Mem.lc{hr})%r.
